mapper.select: SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, STATUS, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE STATUS != 'DELETED' ORDER BY QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT q.QUEST_ID as questId, q.TITLE as title, q.DESCRIPTION as description, q.CATEGORY as category, q.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, q.TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, q.STATUS as status, ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID as questLocationId, ql.LOCATION_ID as locationId, ql.VISIT_ORDER as visitOrder, l.NAME as locationName, l.ADDRESS as address, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL as addressDetail, l.LATITUDE as latitude, l.LONGITUDE as longitude, l.LOCATION_TYPE as locationType FROM LQ_QUEST q INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql ON q.QUEST_ID = ql.QUEST_ID INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON ql.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE q.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ql.VISIT_ORDER = ( SELECT MIN(ql2.VISIT_ORDER) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql2 WHERE ql2.QUEST_ID = q.QUEST_ID ) AND l.LATITUDE IS NOT NULL AND l.LONGITUDE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY q.QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, STATUS, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE QUEST_ID = #{questId}

SELECT ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID as questLocationId, ql.LOCATION_ID as locationId, ql.VISIT_ORDER as visitOrder, l.NAME as name, l.ZIP_CODE as zipCode, l.ADDRESS as address, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL as addressDetail, l.LATITUDE as latitude, l.LONGITUDE as longitude, l.LOCATION_TYPE as locationType, l.DESCRIPTION as description FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON ql.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = #{questId} ORDER BY ql.VISIT_ORDER ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_QUEST SET TITLE = #{title}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, CATEGORY = #{category}, REWARD_EXP = #{rewardExp}, REWARD_POINT = #{rewardPoint}, TIME_LIMIT = #{timeLimit}, STATUS = #{status} WHERE QUEST_ID = #{questId}
mapper.select:
SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, STATUS, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE STATUS != 'DELETED'
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY QUEST_ID DESC
